chunks.title: PURPLE STYLE LABS | DEBT FUNDING · PSLR KYI Sheet - NCDs.xlsx
chunks.content: The provided spreadsheet, titled "PSLR KYI Sheet - NCDs," outlines key information required for Non-Convertible Debenture (NCD) investments. It captures investor details, including name, commitment amount, father's name, and date of birth/incorporation. Crucially, it requires PAN and Aadhaar numbers, along with copies for verification. The sheet also collects contact information like email and phone number, plus banking details (account number, bank name, branch, and IFSC). Additional data points include occupation, address, citizenship/nationality (Indian), residency status (permanent Indian resident), depository participant details (NSDL/CDSL), DP ID, client ID, and CML copy.

chunks.title: PURPLE STYLE LABS | DEBT FUNDING — Sales Pitch (English)
chunks.content:
Headline: India's Luxury Boom Play — 45% Gross Margins, Zero Listed Competition, Pre-IPO Lock at 6.4x Revenue

Elevator: Purple Style Labs owns Pernia's Pop-Up Shop — India's #1 omni-channel luxury fashion destination, scaling 11x from FY21 to FY24 and targeting ₹1,600 Cr by FY29. This NCD offers 12-month fixed-income exposure to a monopolistic platform riding India's fastest-growing luxury segment — projected to hit $85–90 Bn by 2030 — with a marquee cap table (Binny Bansal, Bajaj Holdings, Utpal Sheth-RARE), imminent 12–18 month IPO, and breakeven-to-double-digit EBITDA inflection already underway.

Ideal Client: ₹50L–5Cr ticket HNI / family office with 12–24 month horizon, appetite for structured credit in high-growth private cos, seeking pre-IPO exposure with downside protection and comfort in consumption-led India themes.
